biography: Chester Grecia is a Filipino actor who has gained recognition for his work in contemporary Philippine cinema and streaming productions under VMX (formerly Vivamax). He began his professional career outside the entertainment industry before pursuing acting, where his grounded demeanor and authentic screen presence quickly drew attention. Grecia made his feature film debut in Tayuan (2023) and has since appeared in several dramatic and romantic titles. His performances reflect a growing versatility and dedication to his craft, marking him as one of the emerging talents in the new generation of Filipino actors.
name: Chester Grecia
